mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, session_id, user_input, ai_response, intent, intent_confidence, extracted_info, device_id, reservation_id, execute_result, error_message, llm_model, response_time_ms, created_at FROM chat_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, user_id, session_id, user_input, ai_response, intent, intent_confidence, extracted_info, device_id, reservation_id, execute_result, error_message, llm_model, response_time_ms, created_at FROM chat_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id = #{historyId} LIMIT 1
